title: XCharred-XJuicy-XRomantic Cashew Chicken Lacquerware-Bowl
description: A whole30-friendly, pressure-cooked Indian dish featuring charred and juicy cashews in a butter-chicken style. Served in a lacquerware bowl for added romance.
instructions: Combine cashews, garlic, ginger, curry powder, garam masala, and salt in a bowl. Add sesame oil and stir.
Season chicken breasts with salt. Pat dry with paper towels.
Heat oil in a pressure cooker over medium-high heat. Cook chicken for 3 minutes per side until golden brown.
Add cashew mixture to the cooker. Stir-fry for an additional minute until fragrant.
Close and lock lid. Pressure cook on high for 10 minutes plus natural release time of 25 minutes.
Transfer chicken and sauce to a bowl. Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
